title: FINANCIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: FINANCIAL BEGINNINGS FINANCIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides online personal financial courses to help individuals learn to manage income, eliminate debt, build credit, grow wealth, and protect their assets. Includes five courses, each 1-2 hours long, with each session focused on a key area of personal financial management. 619 SW 11th Avenue Portland, OR 972052646 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (800) 406-1876 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 406-1876 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website. Check Facebook for additional community drop in classes. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Financial Literacy Training If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
